message:
beads: update issue tracking metadata for active workstreams

Update .beads/issues.jsonl with refreshed timestamps and metadata for
in-progress beads including bd-mblr.3.4 (no-mock critical-path
enforcement gate) and related workstream entries. This reflects the
latest status synchronization from the bead tracking system.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1040,7 +1040,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-mblr.3.4","title":"No-Mock Critical-Path Enforcement Gate","description":"Add CI assertion that each designated critical path has at least one non-mock, real-backend test lane and that this requirement is reviewed when new critical paths are introduced.

## Acceptance Criteria
Canonical pass/fail contract is tracked in the issue's structured `acceptance_criteria` field. This section is kept in sync for template conformance and planning hygiene.","design":"Drive validation from invariant coverage matrix instead of ad-hoc hardcoded test name lists.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Gate validates each critical invariant/path has at least one non-mock test lane in required CI execution. - Gate blocks changes introducing new critical paths without corresponding non-mock evidence. - Gate report maps each invariant/path to its proving tests for auditability.  5. Comprehensive unit/property tests with deterministic seeds and invariant checks are required for this bead. 6. At least one deterministic end-to-end scenario script validates integrated behavior with replay instructions and artifact capture. 7. Structured logging/metrics must emit trace/run/scenario identifiers, timing, and actionable failure context, and CI must validate schema conformance.","notes":"Unparented to make no-mock enforcement workstream actionable before parent closure; feature scope unchanged.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-12T23:24:51.056490827Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-15T21:05:34.267688920Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alien-pass-2026-02-13","ev-gated"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.4","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.1.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.4","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.2.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.4","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.2.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":3007,"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.4","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Implemented CI enforcement for no-mock critical-path gate: added crates/fsqlite-harness/src/bin/no_mock_critical_path_gate_runner.rs (machine+human report outputs, FAIL on blocking violations) and wired .github/workflows/unit-test-shard-matrix.yml to execute it, summarize verdict/blocking/warnings, and upload artifacts/no-mock-critical-path-gate/. Validation via rch cargo check/clippy is in progress but currently stalled in remote queue on worker vmi1153651 (job 688).","created_at":"2026-02-15T20:13:25Z"},{"id":3008,"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.4","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Validation blocker: repeated rch exec runs for cargo check/clippy on fsqlite-harness bins (no_mock_critical_path_gate_runner, unit_coverage_drift_gate_runner) are accepted but do not produce reliable completion transcript before session cleanup/interruption. Keeping bead in_progress until clean rch pass/fail output is captured.","created_at":"2026-02-15T20:21:26Z"},{"id":3010,"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.4","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Validation retry attempted again via rch on recovered fleet; no_mock gate CI wiring and runner implementation remain in place. Remote check executions continue to run long without yielding reliable completion transcript in this session, so bead remains in_progress until clean check+clippy evidence is captured.","created_at":"2026-02-15T21:05:34Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-mblr.3.4.1","title":"No-mock critical-path CI gate rule","description":"Enforce CI rule that critical-path verification must be satisfied by real-backend tests, not mock-only suites. Output: auditable rule implementation and failure messaging.

## Acceptance Criteria
Canonical pass/fail contract is tracked in the issue's structured `acceptance_criteria` field. This section is kept in sync for template conformance and planning hygiene.","design":"Implement rule over structured invariant/test mapping generated from bd-mblr.1.3.2 artifacts.","acceptance_criteria":"1. CI rule evaluates non-mock critical-path evidence with deterministic pass/fail semantics. - Rule emits precise failure diagnostics (missing path, expected proving tests, observed evidence). - Rule supports controlled, expiring exceptions with explicit owner metadata.  5. Comprehensive unit/property tests with deterministic seeds and invariant checks are required for this bead. 6. At least one deterministic end-to-end scenario script validates integrated behavior with replay instructions and artifact capture. 7. Structured logging/metrics must emit trace/run/scenario identifiers, timing, and actionable failure context, and CI must validate schema conformance.","notes":"Unparented to unblock critical-path CI gate implementation; no reduction in no-mock enforcement requirements.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-12T23:38:08.898484590Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-14T17:35:30.741586999Z","closed_at":"2026-02-14T17:35:30.741565359Z","close_reason":"Implemented no-mock critical-path CI gate in no_mock_critical_path_gate.rs. 9 tests passing. Unblocks bd-mblr.3.5.1, bd-mblr.3.5, bd-mblr.3.3.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alien-pass-2026-02-13","ev-gated"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.4.1","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.1.4.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.4.1","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.2.2.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.4.1","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.2.3.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.4.1","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.2.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.4.1","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.3.1.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.4.1","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.3.2.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":3003,"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.4.1","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## bd-mblr.3.4.1 Completion — No-Mock Critical-Path CI Gate Rule

### Implementation

Created `crates/fsqlite-harness/src/no_mock_critical_path_gate.rs` implementing the blocking CI gate rule that enforces non-mock evidence for critical-path invariants.

### Architecture

The gate cross-references the UnitMatrix with the NoMockEvidenceMap to ensure every invariant in a critical category has at least one non-mock evidence entry.

**Critical Categories** (blocking): SqlGrammar, VdbeOpcodes, StorageTransaction

**Verdict logic:**
- `PASS` — all critical invariants have real evidence
- `FAIL` — one or more critical invariants have no evidence (blocking)
- `PASS_WITH_WARNINGS` — all covered but some via exceptions only

### Evidence: 9 unit tests passing

All quality gates green: cargo check, clippy, fmt.
","created_at":"2026-02-14T17:35:25Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-mblr.3.5","title":"Unified quality evidence rollup and release-readiness gate","description":"Aggregate outputs from coverage/no-mock/unit/e2e/logging gates into a single deterministic release-readiness decision artifact so users can trust that the implementation is fully validated before merge/release.

## Acceptance Criteria
Canonical pass/fail contract is tracked in the issue's structured `acceptance_criteria` field. This section is kept in sync for template conformance and planning hygiene.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Program outputs one deterministic release-readiness decision per CI run with pass/fail per required gate family (coverage, no-mock unit, e2e scenario coverage, logging conformance, flake policy). 2. Decision artifact links to machine-readable evidence + human summary and is suitable for automated policy checks. 3. Gate fails closed when required evidence is missing, stale, or contradictory.  5. Comprehensive unit/property tests with deterministic seeds and invariant checks are required for this bead. 6. At least one deterministic end-to-end scenario script validates integrated behavior with replay instructions and artifact capture. 7. Structured logging/metrics must emit trace/run/scenario identifiers, timing, and actionable failure context, and CI must validate schema conformance.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T01:34:16.460888968Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-14T00:37:10.685386012Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alien-pass-2026-02-13","ev-gated"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.5","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.5","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.3.1.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.5","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.3.2.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.5","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.3.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.5","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.3.4.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":2843,"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.5","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Added to improve user trust and operator ergonomics: implementation can be technically complete but still hard to evaluate quickly. This bead creates a single source of truth proving that comprehensive unit/e2e/logging gates all passed with auditable evidence.","created_at":"2026-02-13T01:34:36Z"}]}
-{"id":"bd-mblr.3.5.1","title":"Machine-readable validation manifest (coverage + unit + e2e + logging)","description":"Emit one normalized evidence manifest that records gate outcomes, invariant drift status, scenario coverage status, logging conformance status, and artifact references for every required lane.

## Acceptance Criteria
Canonical pass/fail contract is tracked in the issue's structured `acceptance_criteria` field. This section is kept in sync for template conformance and planning hygiene.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Manifest schema is versioned and machine-readable, including gate IDs, outcome, timestamp, commit SHA, and artifact URIs. 2. Manifest captures invariant drift, scenario coverage drift, no-mock critical-path status, and logging conformance status. 3. Manifest generation is deterministic and reproducible across reruns for same inputs. 4. Unit and property tests validate schema evolution, required-field enforcement, deterministic ordering, and backward-incompatible change detection. 5. A deterministic e2e scenario script generates the manifest from real CI artifacts and verifies replayability with exact repro commands. 6. Structured logging emits trace_id/run_id/scenario_id, timing, and artifact linkage, and CI enforces logging-schema conformance for manifest generation.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"RoseTiger","created_at":"2026-02-13T01:34:22.911916746Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-18T20:22:19.234613616Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alien-pass-2026-02-13","ev-gated"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.5.1","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.3.1.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.5.1","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.3.2.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.5.1","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.3.4.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.5.1","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.3.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":3004,"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.5.1","author":"RoseTiger","text":"Implemented manifest determinism cleanup in crates/fsqlite-harness/src/validation_manifest.rs: removed duplicate log/profile validation calls and replaced collect-based aggregate outcome paths with iterator-based aggregation to satisfy strict clippy/pedantic linting. Running rch-based cargo gates now; remote worker scheduling has been unstable so verification is still in progress.","created_at":"2026-02-15T05:55:50Z"},{"id":3059,"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.5.1","author":"IcyTower","text":"Picking up a deterministic contract-hardening slice: enforce gate timestamp/commit consistency and sorted-unique artifact invariants in validation_manifest contract checks, plus targeted tests. Scope intentionally limited to crates/fsqlite-harness/src/validation_manifest.rs to avoid overlap while unblocking downstream manifest consumers.","created_at":"2026-02-18T13:32:51Z"},{"id":3060,"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.5.1","author":"IcyTower","text":"Completed contract-hardening slice in crates/fsqlite-harness/src/validation_manifest.rs: added sorted+unique validation for top-level and per-gate artifact URIs; added gate metadata consistency checks (gate_family/bead_id/summary non-empty, gate timestamp == manifest generated_unix_ms, gate commit_sha == manifest commit_sha); added 3 regression tests for commit mismatch, timestamp mismatch, and unsorted artifact URI detection. Validation notes: rch exec cargo fmt --check now passes after formatting; workspace check/clippy are currently blocked by pre-existing unrelated failures (e.g. fslab schedule() calls on Result lock guards; supervision BulkheadPermit::release mismatch; mvcc clippy int-plus-one).","created_at":"2026-02-18T13:42:57Z"},{"id":3061,"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.5.1","author":"IcyTower","text":"Starting next slice: strengthen deterministic replay contract by hardening ValidationManifest replay command generation (include artifact-uri-prefix + shell-safe quoting for dynamic values) and add focused tests to prevent regressions.","created_at":"2026-02-18T19:16:37Z"},{"id":3062,"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.5.1","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Replay determinism slice complete in validation_manifest.rs: replay.command now built via dedicated helper with shell-safe single-quote escaping and explicit --artifact-uri-prefix; contract validator now enforces replay command fragments and replay.scenario_id parity; added replay command regression tests. Verification: rch exec -- cargo fmt --check passes; rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets and rch exec -- cargo test -p fsqlite-harness replay_command -- --nocapture are currently blocked by pre-existing harness/asupersync API drift (scheduler.lock() now returns Result in fslab/fault_vfs, BulkheadPermit::release removed in supervision).","created_at":"2026-02-18T19:25:03Z"},{"id":3063,"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.5.1","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Starting compile-unblock slice (still under bd-mblr.3.5.1) to restore harness verification flow: patch fslab.rs/fault_vfs.rs for scheduler.lock() -> Result guard handling and supervision.rs for BulkheadPermit release API change. This is prerequisite to run meaningful cargo check/test gates for manifest work.","created_at":"2026-02-18T19:26:33Z"},{"id":3064,"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.5.1","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Compile-unblock slice completed for harness/asupersync lock API drift: updated scheduler lock handling in fslab.rs, fault_vfs.rs, supervision.rs, tests/e2e_sheaf_plus_conformal_mvcc_verification.rs, and tests/mvcc_alien_verification.rs; updated BulkheadPermit release call to release_to(&bulkhead). Verification: rch cargo check -p fsqlite-harness --all-targets now passes; rch cargo test -p fsqlite-harness replay_command -- --nocapture passes (replay command tests + query replay command test). Workspace cargo check --workspace --all-targets passes. Workspace clippy remains blocked by pre-existing unrelated clippy::int_plus_one in crates/fsqlite-mvcc/src/lifecycle.rs:5107.","created_at":"2026-02-18T19:44:33Z"},{"id":3065,"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.5.1","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Added a deterministic ingestion-regression hardening slice in crates/fsqlite-harness/tests/bd_mblr_7_5_2_forensics_cli.rs: replay-command assertions now verify exact command text and deterministic lowest replay-manifest path selection, plus explicit None when no replay manifest exists. Verification: rch exec -- cargo test -p fsqlite-harness --test bd_mblr_7_5_2_forensics_cli -- --nocapture (4 passed) and rch exec -- cargo check -p fsqlite-harness --all-targets (pass).","created_at":"2026-02-18T19:57:16Z"},{"id":3066,"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.5.1","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Starting clippy-unblock slice to recover full workspace verification for manifest lane: claimed crates/fsqlite-mvcc/src/lifecycle.rs to fix current clippy::int_plus_one warning and rerun rch workspace clippy -D warnings.","created_at":"2026-02-18T19:57:44Z"},{"id":3067,"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.5.1","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Completed clippy-unblock follow-up slice. Changes: (1) crates/fsqlite-mvcc/src/lifecycle.rs fixed clippy::int_plus_one in test assertion by replacing '>= before + 1' with '> before'; verified with rch cargo test -p fsqlite-mvcc test_publish_write_set_retires_superseded_version_via_ebr -- --nocapture (pass). (2) crates/fsqlite-harness/src/validation_manifest.rs refactored validate_manifest_contract into smaller helper validators to satisfy clippy::too_many_lines while preserving contract semantics; verified with rch cargo test -p fsqlite-harness replay_command -- --nocapture (pass). rch cargo check --workspace --all-targets passes. Workspace clippy still fails due broader pre-existing lint backlog outside this slice (e.g. fsqlite-harness tests bd_mblr_5_4_1_log_quality_golden.rs and bd_mblr_7_3_1_benchmark_corpus.rs, and many fsqlite-e2e lints in baseline.rs/failure_bundle.rs/lib.rs).","created_at":"2026-02-18T20:16:33Z"},{"id":3068,"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.5.1","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Additional clippy-debt reduction slice completed in harness tests: bd_mblr_5_4_1_log_quality_golden.rs (SEED literal separators + split validate_log_contract into helper collectors to clear too_many_lines), bd_mblr_7_9_2_lane_selector.rs (SEED literal separators), bd_mblr_7_3_1_benchmark_corpus.rs (map(...).unwrap_or(0) -> map_or(0,...)). Verification: rch cargo clippy -p fsqlite-harness --test bd_mblr_5_4_1_log_quality_golden --test bd_mblr_7_9_2_lane_selector --test bd_mblr_7_3_1_benchmark_corpus -- -D warnings now passes.","created_at":"2026-02-18T20:22:19Z"}]}

 {"id":"bd-mblr.3.5.1.1","title":"Manifest ingestion regression: unit+e2e+logging evidence replay","description":"Build a deterministic regression harness that ingests real CI artifacts and verifies manifest completeness for unit, e2e, and logging gates. Include replay-mode validation from archived artifacts so release-readiness decisions remain reproducible.

## Acceptance Criteria
Canonical pass/fail contract is tracked in the issue's structured `acceptance_criteria` field. This section is kept in sync for template conformance and planning hygiene.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Harness consumes real CI artifact bundles and verifies manifest entries for unit, e2e, and logging gates with deterministic pass/fail semantics. 2. Replay mode rehydrates decisions from archived artifacts and must reproduce the original gate outcomes. 3. Unit/property tests validate schema parsing, missing-field handling, and manifest evolution rules. 4. E2E script validates full pipeline from CI artifact generation to report drill-down with structured logging and artifact links.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T23:09:20.090431584Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-14T04:34:59.867289119Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["e2e","ev-gated","frankensqlite","logging","manifest","mblr","quality"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.5.1.1","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.3.5.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-14T04:34:59.867240117Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-mblr.3.5.2","title":"Operator-facing release readiness report with failure drill-down","description":"Generate concise human report summarizing release readiness, blocked criteria, top failing invariants/scenarios, and direct links to detailed artifacts/logs for fast root-cause analysis.

## Acceptance Criteria
Canonical pass/fail contract is tracked in the issue's structured `acceptance_criteria` field. This section is kept in sync for template conformance and planning hygiene.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Human report summarizes readiness status, failing gates, and prioritized remediation list. 2. Every failure entry links to root evidence (logs, artifacts, invariant/scenario IDs) for drill-down. 3. Report is compact enough for CI annotation but complete enough for offline triage handoff. 4. Unit/property tests validate report rendering, priority ordering, evidence-link integrity, and stale-artifact detection. 5. Deterministic end-to-end script builds report from a seeded failing run and verifies replay commands plus artifact drill-down paths. 6. Structured logging captures run_id/report_id/scenario_id, generation timing, and failure-context metadata, and CI validates report log schema.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T01:34:23.192828135Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-14T04:34:59.399272990Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alien-pass-2026-02-13","ev-gated"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.5.2","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.3.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.5.2","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.3.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.5.2","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.3.5.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.5.2","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.3.5.1.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-14T04:22:24.210132619Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
